family_summary: Renewed Russian-Chechen war beginning with the 1999 Dagestan incursion and Russian air-ground campaign, shifting from open invasion and the siege of Grozny to a prolonged insurgency and counterinsurgency inside Chechnya and the wider North Caucasus.
notes: Episode-first bundle. Core DR uses direct violent deaths only. Fully estimated here only for the Chechnya-wide open-war / Grozny-siege episode (1999-09-23 to 2000-05-31). Later insurgency episodes are structured but not fully estimated because numerator-denominator comparability remains weak.
